agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Archives acquires historic Bungoro Tonegawa photograph
agenda_briefs.summary: Council will consider a verbal report on a new acquisition by the Burnaby Archives: a historic photograph by Bungoro Tonegawa. This is a proposed decision to accept the photograph into the city's collection. The report is meant to inform the Commission about the item. No bylaw or regulation change is involved — this is about adding a piece of local history to the archives.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
7.1
VERBAL REPORT: NEW ACQUISITION: BUNGORO TONEGAWA PHOTOGRAPH
Purpose: To provide Commission with information about a historic photograph recently acquired by the Archives.

agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby to consider new heritage sign for Kapoor Singh Siddoo
agenda_briefs.summary: A Provincial 'Stop of Interest' sign for Kapoor Singh Siddoo has been installed at Barnet Marine Park. An unveiling event is being planned. The sign recognizes Kapoor Singh Siddoo, founder of Kapoor Sawmills Limited and advocate for South Asian rights. The sign was fabricated and installed by the Province through a nomination process.
agenda_briefs.action_required: Watch for details on the unveiling event for the Kapoor Singh Siddoo sign at Barnet Marine Park.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
7.2
HERITAGE PROGRAM INITIATIVES
1.
Heritage Program Initiatives 2026-06-11.pdf
2.
Attachment 1 – Kapoor Singh Siddoo Stop of Interest Sign 2026-06-11.pdf
Purpose:
To provide an update on heritage program initiatives.

attachments.title: Attachment 1 – Kapoor Singh Siddoo Stop of Interest Sign 2026-06-11.pdf

agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby to host 2026 Heritage BC Conference
agenda_briefs.summary: Council will consider a proposal to support the 2026 Heritage BC Conference, which would be hosted in Burnaby. A presentation from the Community Heritage Commission will outline the benefits and logistics of bringing this provincial heritage conference to the city. This is an early-stage proposal — no final decision has been made yet.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
9.1
Update on 2026 Heritage BC Conference
Presentation by Paul Kwon and Paddy Murphy, Community Heritage Commission Members
